title: AutoTune FPS
description: AutoTune FPS is a Fabric client-side optimization mod that helps players choose the best performance preset for their PC, with simple recommendations, manual preset selection, and safe recovery if an apply is interrupted.
body:
AutoTune FPS is a client-side Fabric mod designed to make performance tuning easier and safer.

Instead of forcing players to manually test many settings, AutoTune FPS provides clear preset-based optimization options so players can quickly choose the setup that best fits their system and playstyle.

Features:
- Simple optimization presets for different performance goals
- Recommended preset guidance for safer default choices
- Manual preset selection for players who want control
- Clear in-game help through /optimizer help
- Status information through /optimizer status
- Interrupted-apply recovery mode that safely disables auto-apply on the next launch if a preset apply was interrupted
- One-time in-game recovery notice after an interrupted apply

Why use AutoTune FPS?
- Faster and easier setup
- Safer optimization flow
- Better clarity than changing many settings manually
- Useful for players who want improved FPS without guessing

AutoTune FPS is focused on a clean, practical optimization experience for Fabric players on Minecraft 1.21.x.
